topTeamPower.summary: Season average team power: DET in Week 8 profiles as a strong real-life team environment. Core drivers were EPA/play 0.19, success rate 52.0%, and 6 red-zone trips at 68.0% TD conversion. Generates frequent and efficient red-zone opportunities.

Season average team power: MIA in Week 8 profiles as a balanced but middling environment. Core drivers were EPA/play 0.16, success rate 50.0%, and 5 red-zone trips at 62.0% TD conversion. Leans pass-heavy in neutral situations, supporting QB/WR volume.

Season average team power: TEN in Week 8 profiles as a balanced but middling environment. Core drivers were EPA/play 0.03, success rate 47.0%, and 4 red-zone trips at 50.0% TD conversion. No dominant tag signal was triggered this week.

Season average team power: PIT in Week 8 profiles as a balanced but middling environment. Core drivers were EPA/play -0.06, success rate 41.0%, and 2 red-zone trips at 75.0% TD conversion. Rush tendency suppresses broad fantasy ceiling despite some floor.
